# Q 

2 

SYNCRO EVO

## Exterior / coating

### An advanced two-stage ceramic paint coating.

Q² Syncro EVO is a two-stage coating system designed to provide maximum durability, gloss, and long-term protection. It combines Q² Mohs EVO as a base layer with Q² Skin EVO as a dedicated top coat. Together, they form a dense, smooth protective shell with excellent water repellency and enhanced color depth.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/productmain_1700x1645px_q2syncroevo_set_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Second skin for your paint

Q² Syncro EVO is designed for users seeking more than what a single-layer coating can provide. The system enhances durability, boosts self-cleaning capabilities, and adds visual depth, especially on darker colors. Its two-step process ensures consistent performance over time while maintaining controlled and predictable application.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons68.svg)

SELF-CLEANING PROPERTIES 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons79.svg)

PREVENTS UV DAMAGE 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons23.svg)

GUARDS AGAINST THE ELEMENTS 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons81.svg)

WATER REPELLENT 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons47.svg)

OUTDOOR FRIENDLY APPLICATION 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2syncro.webp)

CAPACITIES 

30 & 30 ML / 50 & 50 ML

BOX CONTAINS 

Q² MOHS EVO / Q² SKIN EVO / Q²M COATING APPLICATOR / Q²M CURE 100ML / MANUAL / MAINTENANCE BOOKLET MINI / DOOR STICKERS / #GYEONIZED STICKER 

LIGHTBOX CONTAINS 

Q² MOHS EVO / Q² SKIN EVO / Q²M COATING APPLICATOR LIGHT / MANUAL / MAINTENANCE BOOKLET MINI / DOOR STICKERS / #GYEONIZED STICKER 

Durability 

Beading 

Self-cleaning 

Gloss 

Real World Lifespan

up to 50 MONTHS / 50KKM

PH Tolerance

2-11

Consumption

15-25ml/car

[Instruction](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/2025paintcoatingsmanual.pdf)

COMPARE coatings

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

SYNCRO EVO

01
After polishing, wash the car using Q²M Degrease Tabs and hot water. Make sure the surface is clean. 

02
Ensure the surface is oil-free and completely dry. Apply Q²M Prep. Wait 15 minutes. 

03
Apply Q² Mohs EVO as the base layer with the Q²M Coating Applicator. Ensure the surface is cool and free of dust. 

04
After the base layer has been applied to the whole vehicle, evenly apply Q² Skin EVO immediately as the top layer to improve gloss and water resistance. 

05
For Q² Mohs, wipe it off immediately. When the coating begins to "sweat," it's the ideal moment to wipe. For Q² Skin, wipe off right away, within 10 to 30 seconds of applying. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Why does Q² Syncro EVO use two layers? 

The base layer gives strength and durability, while the top layer improves gloss and hydrophobic behaviour.

02
Is Q² Syncro EVO harder to apply than a single coating? 

It requires more time, but the process remains controlled and clear when following the steps.

03
Can it be applied outdoors? 

Yes. Avoid direct sunlight and keep the surface dry during early curing.

04
Which paint colours benefit most from this system? 

Dark colours show the biggest increase in depth and clarity.

05
How should I maintain the coating? 

Use pH neutral shampoo and boost performance with Q²M Cure when needed.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000244817-Q-Syncro-EVO)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
